summary.note: These tasks are source-known Unsupported blockers, not CardEffect body tasks.

nextFoundationTasks.sourceMeaning: deletion/destruction replacement window for Evade, Barrier, Partition, Scapegoat, and related prevention effects
nextFoundationTasks.missingHeadlessBoundary: delete-prevention replacement queue before actual field removal

nextFoundationTasks.sourceMeaning: generic would-leave-battle-area cut-in before bounce, placement under cards, link placement, and removal paths
nextFoundationTasks.missingHeadlessBoundary: willBeRemoveField target marking, cut-in ordering, target re-fix, and actual movement continuation

nextFoundationTasks.sourceMeaning: specific deck-return replacement window that precedes the generic WhenRemoveField window
nextFoundationTasks.missingHeadlessBoundary: return-to-library pre-move cut-in before deck bottom/top mutation

nextFoundationTasks.sourceMeaning: would-unsuspend cut-in before actual IsSuspended=false mutation and OnUnTappedAnyone trigger
nextFoundationTasks.missingHeadlessBoundary: pre-unsuspend replacement/selection window and target re-fix before primitive unsuspend

nextFoundationTasks.sourceMeaning: would-trash-digivolution-cards cut-in before source cards are removed and OnDigivolutionCardDiscarded fires
